label: Wave Gradient Mask
description: Create a Mask of single wave gradient.

parameters.label: Center
parameters.description: - The wave source center of the single-wave mask.

parameters.label: Width
parameters.description: - The circular ring width of the single-wave mask.

parameters.label: Propagation Radius
parameters.description: - The outer diffusion radius of the single-wave mask.

parameters.label: Blur Radius
parameters.description: - The blur radius of the single-wave mask.

parameters.label: Turbulence Strength
parameters.description: - The turbulent displacement intensity of the single-wave mask.
